statement: In every magma, Equation 3123 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * x) * y`) implies Equation 1631 (`x = (x * x) * ((x * y) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0723
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) x) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x x) (op (op x y) x))
